sentences.text: In this moment of crisis I want to write a suicide letter addressed to everyone I am leaving behind.

In this moment of crisis I want to write a suicide letter addressed to everyone I am leaving behind. In the stark reality of the eviction notice I want to write a suicide letter because I have nowhere to go.
